title: Something Stirs in The Maw
text: Tremors have been felt near The Maw. Animals flee the area. A scholar's journal, found near the entrance, speaks of 'the Sleeper' awakening.

title: The Valdris Gambit
text: Lord Valdris makes a bold move — openly challenging the Emperor's authority by refusing to pay tribute. The other houses must choose sides.

title: The Green Tide
text: Warchief Grak sends emissaries to goblin tribes beyond the hills. If they answer, the Greentusk Horde could triple in size.

title: Scar's Choice
text: Scar of the Iron Fang faces a crossroads: continue raiding, or offer his sword to a noble house in exchange for legitimacy.

title: The Old Order
text: An ancient knightly order — thought dissolved — sends word that they are reforming. They seek worthy champions.

title: The Plague of Shadows
text: A strange malady spreads — not of the body, but of the spirit. People lose hope, give up, wander into the wilds. Something is feeding on despair.
